{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR
 IMP["Implicit\n(auto-detected from\nfirst record)"]
 EXP["Explicit\n(mapping file\nvia -m flag)"]
 USR["User\n(CLI flags:\n-e, -g, -n, -c)"]

 IMP -->|"base"| FINAL["Final Mapping Config"]
 EXP -->|"overrides"| FINAL
 USR -->|"overrides"| FINAL
","style":"notebook"}
